# Baker Farms

> Family-owned California ranch selling premium pasture-raised beef and chicken in monthly boxes and quarter, half, and whole shares. Local pickup in Winchester, CA and shipping available on select beef shares.

## About

- Family owned and operated
- 100% grass-fed and grass-finished beef (Black & Red Angus)
- Humanely raised, all-natural chicken with no hormones, antibiotics, soy, or corn
- Animals are humanely processed
- Local pickup location: Winchester, CA
- Contact: bakermeatco@gmail.com

## Products

### Beef

- **The Beef Box** — Monthly Share, ~20 lbs, $429. Curated butcher's-choice steaks plus ground beef. Local pickup only. ~1 cubic foot of freezer space.
- **1/8 Beef** — Eighth Share, ~40 lbs, $825. Variety of steaks, roasts, ground beef, stew meat, short ribs. Pickup or shipping. 1–2 cubic feet of freezer space.
- **1/4 Beef** — Quarter Share (most popular), ~80 lbs, $1,499. Larger variety pack with steaks, roasts, and ground beef. Pickup or shipping. 2–4 cubic feet of freezer space.
- **1/2 Beef** — Half Share. Delivery: ~160 lbs, $2,799 (boneless cuts). Pickup: 200–250 lbs, $3,399 (includes bones, organs, fat, brisket). 7–10 cubic feet of freezer space.
- **Whole Beef** — Full Share, 400–500 lbs, $6,799. Best value per pound. Local pickup only in Winchester, CA. 14–20 cubic feet of freezer space.

Custom Beef Boxes available — tailored to your family's needs. Inquire at bakermeatco@gmail.com.

### Chicken

- **The Bird Box** — ~20 lbs, $229. 10 lbs boneless skinless thighs + 10 lbs boneless skinless breasts. Local pickup only.
- **The Big Bird Box** — ~40 lbs, $399. 20 lbs boneless skinless thighs + 20 lbs boneless skinless breasts. Local pickup only.

## Ordering

- Full payment is collected at checkout via Stripe.
- Pricing reflects estimated final yield.
- The 1/8, 1/4, and 1/2 Beef shares ship nationally (shipping calculated at checkout) or can be picked up locally.
- The Beef Box, Whole Beef, and all chicken boxes are local pickup only in Winchester, CA.
